summary: Unified penalty buttons feature tested successfully. All 8 test cases PASSED. Holding and Pass Interference now show as single unified buttons with ★ indicator, team selection displays correct yardage for each team, old separate buttons are hidden, and penalty enforcement uses correct team-specific yardage.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

seed_data_creation: Used existing game from live games list
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified penalty buttons feature is working correctly. The ★ indicator shows for penalties that can be committed by either team. Team selection shows correct yardage based on NFHS ruleset.

unified_holding_button.description: Unified 'Holding' button appears in Common Penalties section with ★ indicator

unified_pass_interference_button.description: Unified 'Pass Interference' button appears in Common Penalties section with ★ indicator

holding_team_selection_yardage.description: When clicking Holding, team selection shows '10 yds' for Offense and '5 yds • Auto 1st' for Defense (NFHS ruleset)

pass_interference_team_selection_yardage.description: When clicking Pass Interference, team selection shows '15 yds • Loss of Down' for Offense and '15 yds • Auto 1st' for Defense (NFHS ruleset)

old_holding_buttons_hidden.description: Old separate 'Holding (Offense)' and 'Holding (Defense)' buttons are hidden from Common Penalties and search results

blocking_category_count.description: Category count for Blocking is 4 penalties (reduced from having duplicate holding entries)

search_holding_returns_unified.description: Search for 'holding' returns only the unified Holding penalty, not the hidden separate entries

penalty_enforcement_correct_yardage.description: Penalty enforcement uses correct team-specific yardage when applied. Defensive Holding moved ball from TES 15 to TES 20 (+5 yards) with automatic first down

test_flow: 5. Verified unified Holding button with ★ indicator in Common Penalties
6. Verified unified Pass Interference button with ★ indicator in Common Penalties
7. Clicked Holding - verified team selection shows 10 yds for Offense, 5 yds • Auto 1st for Defense
8. Clicked Pass Interference - verified team selection shows 15 yds • Loss of Down for Offense, 15 yds • Auto 1st for Defense
9. Verified old Holding (Offense) and Holding (Defense) buttons are NOT visible
11. Searched for 'holding' - verified only unified Holding appears in results
12. Applied Defensive Holding penalty - verified ball moved +5 yards with automatic first down

penaltyCatalog.js.unified_holding: Lines 296-361: Unified 'holding' penalty with can_be_committed_by: 'both' and team_variants for offense/defense
penaltyCatalog.js.unified_pass_interference: Lines 414-478: Unified 'pass_interference' penalty with can_be_committed_by: 'both' and team_variants
penaltyCatalog.js.hidden_old_entries: Lines 362-413: Old 'holding_offense' and 'holding_defense' entries marked with hidden: true
penaltyCatalog.js.search_excludes_hidden: Lines 1231-1271: searchPenalties() function skips penalties with hidden: true
penaltyCatalog.js.getPenaltyVariant_team_support: Lines 1194-1225: getPenaltyVariant() accepts optional againstTeam parameter for team-specific variants

PenaltyWorkflowDialog.jsx.star_indicator: Lines 245-249: Shows ★ for penalties with can_be_committed_by === 'both'
PenaltyWorkflowDialog.jsx.team_specific_yardage: Lines 421-449: Team selection buttons show team-specific yardage from team_variants
PenaltyWorkflowDialog.jsx.common_penalties_unified: Lines 226-229: Common penalties list uses unified IDs ('holding' instead of 'holding_offense')
